children.heading: .—Definition
children.label: a .—Definition
children.text: In this section, the term “FCRA” means the Federal Credit Reform Act of 1990 ( et seq.).2 U.S.C. 661

children.heading: .—When not subject to fcra
children.label: 1 .—When not subject to fcra
children.text: The Administrator shall account for payments and disbursements involving obligations guaranteed under this chapter and not subject to FCRA in an account in the Treasury entitled the Federal Ship Financing Fund Liquidating Account (a liquidating account as defined in FCRA).

children.heading: .—When subject to fcra
children.label: 2 .—When subject to fcra
children.text: The Administrator shall account for payments and disbursements involving obligations guaranteed under this chapter and subject to FCRA in a separate account in the Treasury entitled the Federal Ship Financing Guaranteed Loan Financing Account (a financing account as defined in FCRA).

children.heading: .—When not subject to fcra
children.label: 1 .—When not subject to fcra
children.text: The Secretary shall account for payments and disbursements involving obligations guaranteed under this chapter and not subject to FCRA in a separate account in the Treasury established for this purpose.

children.heading: .—When subject to fcra
children.label: 2 .—When subject to fcra
children.text: The Secretary shall account for payments and disbursements involving obligations guaranteed under this chapter and subject to FCRA in a separate account in the Treasury established for this purpose.

children.heading: .—Direct Loans by Secretary
children.label: d .—Direct Loans by Secretary
children.text: The Secretary shall account for payments and disbursements involving direct loans made under this chapter in a separate account in the Treasury established for this purpose.
